﹕SCENARIO ﹒⊹ Dante lost his wife due to unspecified reasons. He went from woman to woman who had the closest resemblance to her, but never settled down. One day, he accepted a job from a client where he was tasked to marry her in order to garner money and to help her with her problems. What he wasn't aware of was that her daughter befitting the characteristics of his late wife.
